---
title: "Research"
---

## Peer-Reviewed Publications

<div class="pub-entry">
Kenkel, D., Mathios, A., Phillips, G., Suryanarayana, R., Wang, H., & Zeng, S. (2026). The Impact of Tobacco Regulations on Smoking and Vaping. Forthcoming at *Southern Economic Journal*.
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
Baggio, M., Suryanarayana, R., & Uchida, S. (2026). Heat and Hate: How Temperature Triggers Discriminatory Violence. *Economics Letters*, 112861.
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
Kenkel, D., Mathios, A., Phillips, G., Suryanarayana, R., Wang, H., & Zeng, S. (2025). Consumer Preferences for Cigarettes and Heated Tobacco Products in Japan: Evidence from a Discrete Choice Experiment. *Applied Economics*, 1-16.
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
Kenkel, D., Mathios, A., Phillips, G., Suryanarayana, R., Wang, H., & Zeng, S. (2025). Understanding the Demand-Side of an Illegal Market: A Case Study of the Prohibition of Menthol Cigarettes. *Health Economics* 34(5), 956-971.
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
Kenkel, D., Mathios, A., Phillips, G., Suryanarayana, R., Wang, H., & Zeng, S. (2024). Just what the doctor ordered? The benefits and costs of e-cigarette regulation in Australia. *Annals of Public and Cooperative Economics*.
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
Baggio, M., Chong, A., & Suryanarayana, R. (2024). High times and troubled relationships: Recreational Marijuana Laws and Intimate Partner Violence. *Economics & Human Biology*, 54, 101399.
</div>

<div class="pub-entry">
Chaudhuri, K., Jha, N., Nilayamgode, M., & Suryanarayana, R. (2024). Alcohol Ban and Crime: The ABCs of the Bihar Prohibition. *Economic Development and Cultural Change*, 72(4).
</div>
